title: Use Case Development Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process for identifying, describing, and refining use cases in software engineering.
relationships: Sequential flow from Identify Actors to Identify Use Cases
Sequential flow from Identify Use Cases to Write Use Case Description
Sequential flow from Write Use Case Description to Create Use Case Diagram
Sequential flow from Create Use Case Diagram to Review & Refine
Feedback loop from Review & Refine back to Identify Actors and Identify Use Cases
